zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Walter de Chesney於大約1085年出生在英國諾福爾可霍斯福德時，他的父親Ralph de Chesney42歲，母親Lady Maud de Waterville38歲。他於大約1136年與Eve de Broc在英國諾福爾可霍斯福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1154年在英國格盧斯特斯爾金也斯 斯坦利享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Chesney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Antrim, Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh, see McChesney .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Chaney  , a cognate of 3 below.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’). Compare Cheney 2.

variants.name: McChesney
meanings: Scottish (Galloway) and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh ‘son of the Saxon (i.e. the Englishman)’. The spelling seems to represent Mac Shasanaigh, to be pronounced originally as McHasney, rather than the English spelling ch.

variants.name: Chestnut
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire and Lanarkshire) and northern Irish: altered form of Chesney , shortened from McChesney . Its assimilation to the English word chestnut is due to folk etymology, the word itself being first recorded in 1519. The surname was probably taken to Ireland at the time of the 17th-century Plantation of Ulster.
English (Norfolk): probably a variant of Chestney (see Chaney ), altered by folk etymological association with the word chestnut.

variants.name: Chesna
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Chesney  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Walter de Chesney was born about 1085, in Horsford, Norfolk, England, his father, Ralph de Chesney, was 42 and his mother, Lady Maud de Waterville, was 38. He married Eve de Broc about 1136, in Horsford, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1154, in King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Walter de Chesney est né environ 1085, à Horsford, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Chesney, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud de Waterville, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Eve de Broc environ 1136, à Horsford, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1154, à King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron Walter de Chesneyが約1085年にイギリスノーフォルクホールスフォードで生まれた時，父Ralph de Chesneyは42歳，母Lady Maud de Watervilleは38歳であった。約1136年にイギリスノーフォルクホールスフォードでEve de Brocと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1154年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアキング'ス スタンリーで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Walter de Chesney(이)가 대략 1085년 영국 노르폴크 호르스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Chesney(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Maud de Waterville(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1136년 영국 노르폴크 호르스퍼드에서 Eve de Broc(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1154년 영국 그루스스터실르 킨그'스 스탠리에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Walter de Chesney родился около 1085 г. в местности хаурсфорд, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Chesney было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud de Waterville, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Eve de Broc около 1136 г. в местности хаурсфорд, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1154 г. в местности кинг'с стэнли, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.
